headline: ResMed (RMD) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback And Growth Expectations
summary: ResMed stock performance and recent context ResMed (RMD) has drawn attention after recent trading, with shares last closing at US$225.99. The stock shows a 0.6% decline over the past day and softer returns over the week, month, and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for ResMed. Recent trading reflects fading short term momentum, with a 30 day share price return of a 12.8% decline and a year to date share price return of a 7.7% decline, while 1 year total shareholder return is 3.8%.
